cwd.description: Working directory of the Claude Code process at event time.
cwd.title: Cwd

session_id.description: Stable per-session identifier from Claude Code.
session_id.title: Session Id

tool_response.description: Tool result (shape varies by tool; passthrough so hooks can inspect freely).
tool_response.title: Tool Response

transcript_path.description: Filesystem path to the active session transcript, when emitted by the harness.
transcript_path.title: Transcript Path
